Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Rippling Sword]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin and her Blood Shadow use the Rippling Sword technique.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Rippling Sword is a technique used by Yerin.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Rippling Sword is a technique that releases a wave of deadly sword madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — The Rippling Sword is a technique used against the woman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin slashes with a Rippling Sword.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Rippling Sword is a technique used by Ruby.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin's Rippling Sword is dense enough to cut through the Hydra’s madra.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The Rippling Sword is a silver-and-red wave of madra used by Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Rippling Sword is a Striker technique.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Yerin used the Rippling Sword against a phantom construct.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
